overrides.expect: \begin{array}{l l} 2 ^ {n + 1} = 2 \cdot 2 ^ {n} \\ > 2 n ^ {2} & \text {(inductive hypothesis)} \\ = n ^ {2} + n ^ {2} \\ \geq n ^ {2} + 5 n & \text {(since n \geq 5)} \\ = n ^ {2} + 2 n + 3 n \\ > n ^ {2} + 2 n + 1 = (n + 1) ^ {2}. \end{array}
overrides.new: \begin{array}{l l} 2 ^ {n + 1} = 2 \cdot 2 ^ {n} \\ > 2 n ^ {2} & \text {(inductive hypothesis)} \\ = n ^ {2} + n ^ {2} \\ \geq n ^ {2} + 5 n & \text {(since } n \geq 5\text{)} \\ = n ^ {2} + 2 n + 3 n \\ > n ^ {2} + 2 n + 1 = (n + 1) ^ {2}. \end{array}

overrides.expect: \begin{array}{l l} a _ {n + 1} = 2 a _ {n} + 1 & \text {(definition of a_{n+1})} \\ = 2 (2 ^ {n} - 1) + 1 & \text {(inductive hypothesis)} \\ = 2 ^ {n + 1} - 2 + 1 = 2 ^ {n + 1} - 1. \end{array}
